description:
From the lernie postmortem (2026-04-22): an agent worked for hours on a stale base. Main advanced with a new workspace member during the claim, surfaced as a noisy cargo-workspace error rather than a bl-level signal. A 'main +N commits since claim' indicator at session start would have changed the entire shape of that task.

Surface the count in 'bl prime' output (both human text and --json). Compute via 'git rev-list --count merge-base(main, work/<id>)..main' for each claimed task. No need to add a stored field — the worktree branch's merge-base with main IS the claim point. Threshold-free: any non-zero count is shown.
title: warn at prime when main has advanced since claim
